header.title: From keyword to published article in 4 steps.

items.desc: Uses SERP data, your Brand Voice, and Knowledge Base documents to write the article.

header.title: Answers to what's holding you back

microCta.text: Still have questions? Try it yourself — first 3 articles are free.

items.q: How is this different from ChatGPT?
items.a: ChatGPT generates text from scratch without your market context. Draft2Live first analyzes Google's TOP 10 in your specific country, studies competitor structure and keywords, then writes an article in your style and publishes it to your CMS with meta tags and images. It's not a text generator — it's a full cycle: research, writing, publishing.
items.aPlain: ChatGPT generates text from scratch without your market context. Draft2Live first analyzes Google's TOP 10 in your specific country, studies competitor structure and keywords, then writes an article in your style and publishes it to your CMS with meta tags and images. It's not a text generator — it's a full cycle: research, writing, publishing.

items.a: Google states clearly: content quality is what matters, not how it's created. Draft2Live writes based on real SERP data, checks every article across 8 SEO metrics, and won't publish until the score reaches 85. Across 5,000+ published articles, no client has received penalties.
items.aPlain: Google states clearly: content quality is what matters, not how it's created. Draft2Live writes based on real SERP data, checks every article across 8 SEO metrics, and won't publish until the score reaches 85. Across 5,000+ published articles, no client has received penalties.

items.q: How long does one article actually take?
items.a: On average 20 minutes: enter a keyword, get a published article on your site. SERP analysis takes 2–3 minutes, generation 10–12 minutes, CMS publishing a few seconds. You can run multiple articles in parallel.
items.aPlain: On average 20 minutes: enter a keyword, get a published article on your site. SERP analysis takes 2–3 minutes, generation 10–12 minutes, CMS publishing a few seconds. You can run multiple articles in parallel.

items.q: What is Knowledge Base and why do I need it?
items.a: It's your document library: product descriptions, pricing, technical specs, FAQ. AI pulls data from it when writing, so articles contain accurate facts, prices, and details specific to your business — not generic phrases.
items.aPlain: It's your document library: product descriptions, pricing, technical specs, FAQ. AI pulls data from it when writing, so articles contain accurate facts, prices, and details specific to your business — not generic phrases.

items.q: Is it suitable for an agency with multiple clients?
items.a: Yes, that's exactly what the Team and Enterprise plans are for. You connect multiple sites, set up separate Brand Voice for each client, and with white-label clients don't even know you're using Draft2Live.
items.aPlain: Yes, that's exactly what the Team and Enterprise plans are for. You connect multiple sites, set up separate Brand Voice for each client, and with white-label clients don't even know you're using Draft2Live.

items.q: What if it doesn't work for me?
items.a: Start with the free plan: 3 articles per month with full SERP analysis and SEO audit, no card required. Paid plans come with a 30-day money-back guarantee. You can cancel your subscription in one click at any time.
items.aPlain: Start with the free plan: 3 articles per month with full SERP analysis and SEO audit, no card required. Paid plans come with a 30-day money-back guarantee. You can cancel your subscription in one click at any time.
